caption: Figure 6 DPN Argentina Content: World Health Day Celebration (7 April 2021).⁹⁸
description: A screenshot of a Twitter post from Defensoría del Pueblo (DPN Argentina) celebrating World Health Day on April 7, 2021. The tweet includes text in Spanish about universal health coverage and an image featuring a stethoscope over a globe with the SDG logo and the date '7 de Abril'.
